mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in RSAFS signals strengthening household demand, raises near-term revenue expectations for index constituents, and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot latest RSAFS vintage observation was available for 2013-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional 20-day base rate over a 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration, weaker household income growth, and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot UNRATE vintage value was 7.3 for 2013-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned below 0.25% and CPIAUCSL inflation is not accelerating, low discount rates dominate inflation risk and predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 0.25% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth is below its 12-month growth rate
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.08 for 2013-09-01
regime_hint: zero-lower-bound monetary accommodation with contained inflation
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction state has a nonpositive average 60-day S&P 500 return or a 60-day hit rate below the unconditional positive-return frequency in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 1-month change in INDPRO signals improving production momentum and near-term operating leverage, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot INDPRO vintage value was 99.3579 for 2013-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month INDPRO changes have a 5-day forward return Rank IC below 0.02 in two consecutive 3-year rolling walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in HOUST below its 12-month trend signals weakening residential investment and cyclically sensitive demand, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month moving average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot HOUST vintage value was 891.0 for 2013-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside-break triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered returns are not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent positive 3-month growth in PAYEMS and RSAFS identifies an income-consumption feedback loop that raises earnings expectations and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS and RSAFS both show positive 3-month log changes
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot PAYEMS vintage value was 136133.0 for 2013-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive PAYEMS-RSAFS state does not outperform either single-series positive state on average 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation momentum crosses above its 12-month pace while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%, markets price future policy tightening and margin pressure, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above its 12-month growth rate while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot CPIAUCSL vintage value was 233.526 for 2013-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have a positive average 5-day S&P 500 return or if negative-return frequency is not at least 5 percentage points above the unconditional negative-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: A GDPC1 quarterly growth rate crossing above 2% annualized signals broad real-demand acceleration, supports earnings growth, and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above 2%
evidence_refs: fact:2013-10-15 snapshot GDPC1 vintage value was 15679.7 for 2013-04-01
regime_hint: post-shock recovery or mid-cycle real-demand acceleration
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth-above-2% triggers have a 60-day S&P 500 average return below the unconditional average or a Rank IC below 0.03 over any 4-year rolling window.
